text:
The problem has been revealed by the recent conversion to pkg.
  # grep PKG /etc/make.conf
  WITH_PKGNG="yes"

------------------------------------------------------------
# cd /usr/ports/lang/tcl86
# make install
..

===>   Registering installation for tcl-8.6.b.3
Installing tcl-8.6.b.3...pkg: tcl-8.6.b.3 conflicts with open-motif-2.3.3_2 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/man/man3/Object.3.gz
*** [fake-pkg] Error code 70

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/tcl86.
*** [install] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/tcl86.
